nonBlockingIssues.description: Nav review found duplicated desktop/mobile menu markup in `website/components/Nav.tsx`, pushing the component past the mission's 300-line convention and increasing future drift risk.

Website marketing copy has drifted from canonical root product metadata: hero content and prerecorded terminal demo output still say `35 skills` while root docs/package metadata currently say `39 skills`.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented in `.factory/library/environment.md` that the repo-root `.gitignore` ignores nested `bun.lock` files, leaving `website/bun.lock` untracked unless ignore rules change.

Documented in `.factory/library/environment.md` that canonical root product copy currently says `39 skills` while some website copy/demo content still says `35`, so future website edits should cross-check root docs until a single source of truth exists.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace the stale `Vitest + React Testing Library` wording with Bun test runner guidance so the skill matches mission conventions and actual website tests.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The same mismatch was flagged by reviews for `footer-component`, `hero-section`, `features-grid`, and `terminal-demo-component`; `.factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md` still advertises Vitest while mission AGENTS.md and the website tests use `bun:test`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance for scaffold-first features and dirty/pre-seeded worktrees, including when workers may defer TDD/baseline validation until after initial setup.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for `nextjs-project-scaffold` and `features-grid` both recorded justified deviations because the website project or feature files already existed before the worker began, but the skill currently only describes a clean-tree TDD flow.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a shared rule for marketing-facing website work to cross-check hardcoded product stats against canonical root metadata/docs before landing copy or prerecorded demos.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Reviews for `hero-section`, `terminal-demo-component`, and `features-grid` all surfaced drift around the marketed skill count (`35` in website copy vs `39` in root docs/package metadata).

rejectedObservations.observation: Document a built-static preview fallback in `.factory/services.yaml` for all frontend features.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: this came from a single nav review transcript, was not reproduced during scrutiny validation, and could encode an environment-specific workaround as the default service contract.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated Vitest-vs-Bun shared-state observations across multiple feature reviews.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated into one systemic frontend-worker skill recommendation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated 35-vs-39 marketed-skill-count drift observations across multiple feature reviews.
rejectedObservations.reason: duplicate: consolidated into one library update plus one systemic AGENTS guidance recommendation.
